closureNotes.outcome:
Precursor gamma (final precursor before PR 1.1 URN reconcile resumed) landed on EB main at ca68e51 (PR #314). Per v1.0.0 spec (SR PR #152 5c9ad4a): 5 scope files. Test cleanup + live MCP runtime crash fix shipped together.

OUT-1: schema-validation.test.ts beforeAll guards currentTruth via existsSync; 2 currentTruth-dependent tests use it.skipIf(!currentTruthExists); 8 previously-collaterally-blocked valid tests (Decision Category Enum, Service Schema, Server Schema, GraphQL Enum Syntax, Data Consistency for decisions/services) now run successfully.

OUT-2: platform-context.adapter.ts loadCurrentTruth() mirrors canonical loadArchitecture and loadDependencies guard pattern. Live MCP runtime crash on getNodes() path resolved. Adapter returns RawCurrentTruth with empty nodes array when file absent.

OUT-3: data-paths.config.ts preserved (backward compat for migration scripts).

OUT-4: FU-EB-SCHEMA-VALIDATION-TEST-CURRENT-TRUTH-1 closed; new FU-EB-CURRENT-TRUTH-LOWER-PRIORITY-CONSUMERS-GUARD-1 (P3) filed open for migration scripts + service file consumer guards.

OUT-5: DEC d-2026-06-06-decommissioned-data-guard-pattern-canonical appended (canonical schema shape verified Python jsonschema Draft 7 PASS via sandbox-validation BEFORE staging — pattern absorbed from alpha lesson).

OUT-6: SPEC.md present.

0 in-PR fix commits. 0 --admin overrides. deploy-to-dev label fired the lane. EB main ca68e51 reached substrate-clean state, enabling PR 1.1 URN reconcile to resume immediately after this TD.
closureNotes.overrideRecord:
One pre-stage substrate-correction captured for the audit trail:

1. DEC id pattern caught by sandbox-validation pre-stage. Initial DEC id used existsSync (capital S) violating the kebab-case decisionId pattern. Python jsonschema Draft 7 validation rejected at the sandbox layer BEFORE tarball was staged. Renamed to d-2026-06-06-decommissioned-data-guard-pattern-canonical (all lowercase kebab-case, semantic meaning preserved). Tarball re-authored with corrected DEC id, sandbox-validated again, PASSED, then staged.

Forward observation: gamma is the second precursor to land with zero in-PR fixes (beta was first). Pre-stage sandbox-validation catching DEC id pattern violation is the substrate-correction discipline working at the earliest possible layer — before tarball staging, before terminal apply, before CI. This integrates the alpha + beta lessons: alpha caught DEC shape gap at CI (in-PR fix), beta absorbed shape lesson but drift-refusal caught dirty tree at execution, gamma now catches DEC id pattern at chat-side sandbox before anything reaches the terminal. Substrate-correction discipline has now integrated three layers across the precursor arc.

Bonus value confirmed: original delta scope (voxel-stream.spec.ts timeout) RESOLVED as side effect of beta's forks-pool fix. No separate delta deliverable needed. Sequence collapsed from 4 precursors to 3.
